name: unihub-monorepo-dev
description: Local dev orchestration for Forum + UEBot (single terminal)

scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n forum-be,forum-fe,uebot-be,uebot-fe -c blue,green,magenta,yellow "npm run dev:forum-be" "npm run dev:forum-fe" "npm run dev:uebot-be" "npm run dev:uebot-fe"
scripts.dev:forum: concurrently -n forum-be,forum-fe -c blue,green "npm run dev:forum-be" "npm run dev:forum-fe"
scripts.dev:uebot: concurrently -n uebot-be,uebot-fe -c magenta,yellow "npm run dev:uebot-be" "npm run dev:uebot-fe"
